context_only: # 0.23.0 — Audit Redesign, Enforcement, Round Memory, and Domain Lenses
### 2.4 Prompt-level field naming (avoid confusion with finding category)
### 3.4 No spec excerpt for non-spec roles
### 4.4 No full parser bundled in v0.23.0
### 5.2 Task-to-file mapping and per-role selection rules

tasks.title: Add Task gate_skipped_reason field
tasks.acceptance:
- Task.GateSkippedReason string field with omitempty json tag exists
- tp reopen clears gate_skipped_reason
- tp set rejects gate_skipped_reason as managed field
tasks.closed_reason:
- Task.GateSkippedReason string field with omitempty json tag exists at internal/model/task.go:34, round-trip tested
- tp reopen clears gate_skipped_reason at internal/cli/reopen.go:59
- tp set rejects gate_skipped_reason as managed field at internal/cli/set.go:25, test TestSetRejectsGateSkippedReason green

tasks.title: Add Workflow gate timeout checks cap fields
tasks.acceptance:
- Workflow gains GateTimeoutSeconds default 600, Checks default empty, ReviewMaxRounds and AuditMaxRounds default 0 via UnmarshalJSON
- every row of the 6.7 field table serializes with stated defaults
tasks.closed_reason:
- Workflow gains GateTimeoutSeconds default 600, Checks default [], ReviewMaxRounds/AuditMaxRounds default 0 via UnmarshalJSON at internal/model/workflow.go:41; explicit zero preserved
- 6.7 field table serialization: TestWorkflow_FieldTableSerialization asserts gate_timeout_seconds:600, checks:[], review_max_rounds:0, audit_max_rounds:0 round-trip; go test ./... + golangci-lint run green

tasks.title: Enforce workflow field write and read rules
tasks.acceptance:
- tp set --workflow rejects out-of-range gate_timeout_seconds and max_rounds with exit 1
- hand-edited out-of-range values fall back to 600 and 0 at read time with tp validate warnings
- quality_gate stays read-only via tp set
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp set --workflow: gate_timeout_seconds 30-3600, review/audit_max_rounds 0-50 araligi disinda output.Error + exit 1 (internal/cli/set.go workflowFieldRange)
- El ile bozulmus degerler icin Workflow.Effective* helper'lari 600/0'a düşüyor (internal/model/workflow.go); tp validate ayni durumlar icin warning üretiyor (validateConvergence)
- quality_gate readOnlyWorkflowFields icinde kaliyor, tp set --workflow reddediyor

tasks.title: Implement shared RunCommand runner
tasks.acceptance:
- RunCommand runs sh -c on Unix and cmd /C on Windows with inherited env and caller cwd
- 64 KB ring buffer captures combined output with parameterized tail size
- timeout counts as failure with timed-out message
tasks.closed_reason:
- RunCommand at internal/engine/runcmd.go:64 uses sh -c on Unix, cmd /C on Windows (runtime.GOOS), cmd.Env inherited (nil), cmd.Dir = caller-provided dir
- tailBuffer bounds combined stdout+stderr to 64 KB (runBufferSize), tail(n) parameterizes reported line count
- context.WithTimeout + DeadlineExceeded branch returns Passed=false, ExitCode=nil, Message 'timed out after <N>s'

tasks.title: Test RunCommand success failure timeout
tasks.acceptance: - TestRunCommand_Success_Failure_Timeout passes per the 19.1 description
tasks.closed_reason: - TestRunCommand_Success_Failure_Timeout internal/engine/runcmd_test.go'da: exit 0 -> Passed, exit 3 -> failure + output tail, sleep 5 + 1s timeout -> TimedOut + 'timed out after 1s' mesaji; tail parametresi ve cwd/env kalitimi da alt testlerde; go test ./... yesil

tasks.title: Rewrite VerifyClosure with evidence-line rule
tasks.acceptance:
- ExtractKeywords stopWords technicalTermRegex and length check deleted per 7.1
- N>=2 criteria require N column-0 evidence lines; indented bullets do not count; N<=1 passes on non-empty reason
- forbidden patterns retained and covered-by skips verification; error hint enumerates criteria per 7.4
tasks.closed_reason:
- ExtractKeywords, stopWords, technicalTermRegex, filePathRegex ve min-length check silindi; gatePassed parametresi VerifyClosure imzasindan kaldirildi (internal/engine/closure.go)
- N>=2 kriter icin N adet kolon-0 '- ' evidence satiri zorunlu (CountEvidenceLines); girintili bullet sayilmiyor; N<=1 bos olmayan reason ile geciyor
- Forbidden pattern'lar korundu, coveredBy dogrulamayi atliyor; ClosureError.Hint kriterleri numarali sayiyor, cli done/close cagri noktalari ClosureHint kullaniyor

tasks.title: Test closure verification v2
tasks.acceptance: - TestVerifyClosure_EvidenceLines TestVerifyClosure_ForbiddenPatternsRetained TestVerifyClosure_KeywordMachineryGone pass per 19.1
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestVerifyClosure_EvidenceLines internal/engine/closure_test.go'da: 3 kriter + 3 kolon-0 satir geciyor, 3+2 sayilari isimleyerek düşüyor, girintili satirlar sayilmiyor, 1 kriter + serbest metin geciyor
- TestVerifyClosure_ForbiddenPatternsRetained: erteleme kalibi, tek kelime ve yol icermeyen mevcut-kapsam iddiasi reddediliyor
- TestVerifyClosure_KeywordMachineryGone: Turkce prose kriterler eslesen evidence-satiri sayisiyla geciyor

tasks.title: Wire gate into done and close
tasks.acceptance:
- every row of the 6.1 trigger table implemented; gate runs once per invocation after cheap checks
- gate runs pre-flock then flock re-read re-validates state atomically for single and multi per 6.2 item 6
- gate_passed_at stamped on success per 6.3
tasks.closed_reason:
- 6.1 tablosu: done single/multi/batch/auto-commit ve close gate'i invocation basina bir kez kosuyor (internal/cli/gate.go runQualityGatePreFlock, batchHasSurvivor); tp commit gate kosmyor; --covered-by gate'i atlamiyor; ucuz kontroller (checkDoneTarget) gate'ten once
- Gate flock'tan ONCE kosuyor; sonra flock icinde re-read + re-validate mevcut govdelerle korunuyor (done.go/close.go pre-flock bloklari); basarisizlikta exit 4, hicbir gorev kapanmiyor (TestGate_FailureClosesNothingWithExit4)
- Basarida kapanan her gorev gate_passed_at damgasi aliyor (gateRan || doneGatePassed); 6 yeni TestGate_* testi + tum suite + lint yesil

tasks.title: Gate failure error output
tasks.acceptance:
- exit 4 JSON error carries gate_cmd exit_code output_tail and hint per 6.4
- timeout reports gate timed out after Ns with null exit_code
tasks.closed_reason:
- Exit 4 JSON hatasi gate_cmd, exit_code, output_tail ve hint tasiyor (gate.go runQualityGatePreFlock/emitBatchGateFailure; TestGate_FailureClosesNothingWithExit4 alanlari dogruluyor)
- Timeout 'gate timed out after Ns' mesaji + null exit_code: gateFailureMessage ve TestGateFailureMessage_TimeoutReportsSecondsAndNullExitCode (internal/cli/gate_unit_test.go)

tasks.title: Implement --skip-gate escape hatch
tasks.acceptance:
- all 8 items of the 6.5 list implemented including empty-reason exit 2, no gate execution, recorded reason, show and report display
- --skip-gate with --gate-passed is exit 2
tasks.closed_reason:
- 6.5'in 8 maddesi: bos reason exit 2 (done+close), gate kosulmuyor (TestSkipGate_RecordsReasonAndSkipsExecution), gate_skipped_reason kaydediliyor + gate_passed_at null, gate'siz projede de kayit (TestSkipGate_RecordedEvenWithoutGate), show otomatik (omitempty) + report'a gate_skipped_reason alani eklendi, reopen temizligi ve tp set reddi onceki gorevden mevcut (reopen.go:59, gate_skip_field_test.go)
- Batch: entry bazli skip_gate (pointer alan), bos/whitespace deger entry'yi failures'a dusuruyor ve skip sayilmiyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEmptySkipGateFailsEntry), hepsi skip ise gate hic kosmuyor (TestSkipGate_BatchAllSkipNeverRunsGate), gate dusse bile skip entry'ler kapaniyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEntriesCloseDespiteGateFailure)
- --skip-gate + --gate-passed exit 2, --skip-gate + --batch exit 2 (TestSkipGate_UsageErrors); tum suite + lint yesil

tasks.title: Gate batch semantics
tasks.acceptance:
- cheap-check failures land in failures pre-gate; gate runs iff a surviving non-skip entry exists; skip entries close regardless of gate result per 6.1 and 6.4
- --skip-gate flag with --batch is exit 2; empty skip_gate entry fails into failures and does not count as skip
tasks.closed_reason:
- Ucuz-kontrol hatalari failures'a dusuyor ve gate'i tetiklemiyor (batchNeedsGate; TestGateBatch_CheapCheckFailuresDoNotTriggerGate); gate yalniz skip'siz survivor varsa 1 kez kosuyor (TestGateBatch_MixedCheapFailureAndSurvivorRunsGateOnce); skip entry'ler gate sonucundan bagimsiz kapaniyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEntriesCloseDespiteGateFailure)
- --skip-gate + --batch exit 2 (TestSkipGate_UsageErrors); bos skip_gate entry failures'a dusuyor ve skip sayilmiyor (TestSkipGate_BatchEmptySkipGateFailsEntry, batchNeedsGate cheap-check dali)

tasks.title: Keep --gate-passed compatibility
tasks.acceptance:
- flag ignored with info when quality_gate set; attestation preserved when unset per 6.6
- flag no longer affects closure verification
tasks.closed_reason:
- quality_gate doluyken flag yok sayiliyor + 'quality gate is executed by tp; --gate-passed ignored' info (done single/multi pre-flock; TTY-only cunku output.Info JSON modda sessiz); damga gerçek gate kosusundan (TestGatePassedCompat_IgnoredWithInfoWhenGateSet)
- quality_gate bosken attestation korunuyor, gate_passed_at flag'le damgalaniyor (TestGatePassedCompat_AttestationPreservedWithoutGate); flag closure dogrulamayi artik etkilemiyor (VerifyClosure imzasindan gatePassed engine-closure-v2'de kaldirildi)

tasks.title: Test gate execution paths
tasks.acceptance: - TestDoneGate_RunsOncePerInvocation TestDoneGate_AllSkipBatchNoRun TestDoneGate_SkipGateRecorded TestDoneGate_GatePassedCompat pass per 19.2
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestDoneGate_RunsOncePerInvocation: 3'lu batch tek gate kosusu, non-batch hata hicbir gorevi kapatmiyor, batch hatada yalniz skip entry'ler kapaniyor (internal/cli/donegate_test.go)
- TestDoneGate_AllSkipBatchNoRun, TestDoneGate_SkipGateRecorded (set reddi + reopen temizligi dahil), TestDoneGate_GatePassedCompat (flag yok sayma + attestation + skip-gate kombinasyonu exit 2) hepsi geciyor; suite + lint yesil

tasks.title: Parse spec YAML frontmatter
tasks.acceptance:

tasks.closed_reason:
- tp: mapping'i gopkg.in/yaml.v3 ile parse ediliyor; domain (default software) ve lens (implementer/tester/architect/all) anahtarlari okunuyor, diger top-level anahtarlar yok sayiliyor (internal/engine/frontmatter.go; go.mod'a ilk YAML bagimliligi eklendi)
- Kapanmayan blok icerik sayiliyor + lint error; kapali-ama-bozuk YAML bloklarda blok excluded kaliyor, defaults uygulaniyor + parse hatasi lint error (TestParseFrontmatter_StructuralFailures)
- Non-string domain, non-mapping lens/tp, bilinmeyen lens anahtari, non-list deger, non-string eleman: hepsi lint warning + ignore (TestParseFrontmatter_ShapeWarnings, _NonMappingLensAndTP)

tasks.title: Exclude frontmatter from all parsers
tasks.acceptance: - all 8 exclusion surfaces of the 12.2 list implemented with absolute line numbers preserved
tasks.closed_reason:
- BlankFrontmatter/BlankFrontmatterLines (engine/frontmatter_blank.go) blogu bos satirlarla degistirerek mutlak satir numaralarini koruyor; 8 yuzey bagli: countContentLines, ParseHeadings, cli lint parseSpecFile (lint kurallari + structured extraction ayni lines'i kullaniyor), DiffSections cagrilari (review.go + review_verify.go), readSpecContent (inline embed), audit.go specData, ExtractSpecExcerpt (plan/show/next spec_excerpt) fm satirlarini atliyor
- Yapisal bozulma davranisi parser'dan geliyor: kapanmayan blok Present=false oldugundan icerik sayiliyor, bozuk YAML'da blok excluded kaliyor; TestBlankFrontmatter_ParserExclusion 3 yuzeyi mutlak satir numarasiyla dogruluyor

tasks.title: Report frontmatter in lint output
tasks.acceptance: - tp lint --json emits frontmatter object with present lines domain lens_roles per 12.4 including the exact no-frontmatter shape
tasks.closed_reason:
- tp lint --json frontmatter nesnesi {present, lines ('1-K'), domain, lens_roles} emit ediyor; lens_roles bos-olmayan listeli anahtarlar implementer,tester,architect,all sirasiyla (lint.go lintFrontmatter; TestLintFrontmatter_ObjectShapes)
- Frontmatter'siz spec'te tam sekil {present:false, lines:null, domain:'software', lens_roles:[]}; bozuk YAML parse hatasini adlandiran lint error + defaults (ayni testin alt vakalari)

tasks.title: Test frontmatter parse and exclusion
tasks.acceptance: - TestFrontmatter_ParseAndExclusion TestFrontmatter_MalformedYAML TestFrontmatter_Unterminated pass per 19.1
tasks.closed_reason:
- TestFrontmatter_ParseAndExclusion: tp mapping parse + content lines, headings, structured elements, DiffSections ve spec_excerpt bloktan ariniyor; mutlak satir numaralari korunuyor (internal/engine/frontmatter_named_test.go)
- TestFrontmatter_MalformedYAML: kapali-bozuk blok excluded kaliyor, defaults + lint error; TestFrontmatter_Unterminated: acilip kapanmayan blok icerik + lint error, icindeki heading parse ediliyor

tasks.title: Implement review state engine
tasks.acceptance:
- state directory layout and initial state.json written by first creator per 8.1 and 8.2
- flock-guarded writes, round arithmetic, consecutive_clean, spec_hash staleness computed per 8.2 and 8.6
- corrupt or index-less directory aborts with exit 3; missing round file skipped with warning
tasks.closed_reason:
- 8.1 dizin yerlesimi (ReviewStateDir: <spec-dir>/.tp-review/<spec-base>) ve ilk {spec, review_rounds:[], audit_rounds:[]} indeksi ilk olusturanda yaziliyor (EnsureReviewState, internal/engine/reviewstate.go)
- Yazimlar state.json flock'u altinda (WithReviewStateLock, mevcut WithFileLock uzerinden); tur aritmetigi len+1, ConsecutiveClean kuyruk sayimi, SpecHash sha256:<hex> ve StateStale/Converged 8.6'ya gore (TestConsecutiveCleanAndStaleness)
- Bozuk state.json veya indekssiz-dolu dizin StateCorruptError ile abort (exit 3 + 'repair or delete <path>' hint'i cli'de baglanacak); eksik round dosyasi LoadRoundRows found=false ile atlanip uyarilabiliyor, tur aritmetiginde sayilmaya devam ediyor

- Alti workflow alani tek zincirden donuyor (tf.Workflow butun halinde; defaults 2/2 clean, 0 cap, 600s, bos checks); 3 dal TestResolveWorkflow_* ile test edildi

- 8.4 satir kurallari: bos satir atlama, gecersiz JSON'da satir numarasiyla exit 1, pre-resolved fixed abort, bos-kanitli wontfix exit 1, wontfix turu kirletmiyor, duplicate kirletiyor; sifir satir clean tur (parseRecordRows; TestReviewRecord_RowRules + _Lifecycle)

tasks.closed_reason:
- --status 8.5 seklini basiyor: review_rounds, consecutive_clean, required_clean_rounds (8.6 zinciriyle), converged, stale, mechanical_checks (kosum sonucu olmadan kayitli liste); bos state'te tam sekil + exit 0 (TestReviewStatus_EmptyStateFullShape); budget_exhausted yalniz cap>0 iken (8.8 formulu)
- --check tum workflow.checks'i 6.2 ortaminda kosuyor, pass/fail + yalniz basarisizlarda output_tail; exit 0 ancak converged VE tum checkler gecince (TestReviewStatus_CheckRunsChecksAndGatesExit); bare --check / --record --check / --status+mod kombinasyonlari exit 2 (TestReviewStatus_FlagRules); runMechanicalChecks 15.3 icin paylasilan yardimci
